mapper.select: select cu_code || '_' || cu_sangho as cust from c_cust where chk_sale=1 order by cu_code
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_outbound (outdate, barcode , ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, bdate, seq, qty, scmmex, type, pbarcode,custcode) values ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{scmmex}, #{type}, #{pbarcode}, #{custcode})
mapper.update: update t_wms_worklocation set useyn = 'N', ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), memo_d = #{source}, loginid_d = #{loginid} where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'

update t_wms_worklocation set useyn = 'Y' , ymdhms_d = '', memo_d = '' where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'N' AND iid = ( SELECT MAX(iid) FROM t_wms_worklocation WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
)
mapper.select: SELECT REPLACE(SPEC,'-','') AS OITEMCODE FROM T_MI_ITEM WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_workoutbound (outdate, barcode , ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, qty, custcode, source, storage, factory, source3, seq) values ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{custcode}, #{source}, #{storage1}, #{factory},#{factoryno}, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) + 1 FROM t_wms_workoutbound WHERE outdate = #{date}))
mapper.select: select c.subname_ch as car, b.itemcode as itemcode, a.barcode as barcode, a.qty as qty, substr(a.ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(a.ymdhms,11,2) as time, mes_key, case when exists ( select 1 from T_MM_ENTERSUB s where s.mes_key = a.mes_key ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as key_exist from t_wms_workoutbound a left outer join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode left outer join t_mi_typesub c on b.carno = c.subcode and c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE d on a.barcode = d.barcode where a.outdate = #{date} and upper(a.factory) = upper(#{factory}) and a.useyn = 'Y' order by a.iid desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wms_outbound ( outdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode,
bdate, seq, qty, scmmex, type,
source, source2, source3,
storage, factory, invoiceno, custcode,
custname, dock, intf_yn ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode},
#{bdate}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{scmmex}, #{type},
#{source}, #{source2}, #{factoryno},
#{storage}, #{factory}, #{memo}, #{custcode},
#{custname}, #{dock}, 'W' )

insert into t_wms_workstock (mainkind, kind, sdate, barcode ,outqty, qty, factory,storage,workcenter,location, itemcode, insuser,ymdhms,insdate) values (#{mainkind}, #{source}, #{date}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{workcenter}, #{location}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))

insert into t_wms_location (indate,ymdhms,location,barcode,itemcode, qty,loginid,factory,storage,source) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{source} )
mapper.update: update t_wms_workoutbound set useyn = 'N', ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), memo_d = #{dmemo}, loginid_d = #{loginid} where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
